title: lastreopsis lurida
intro: Lastreopsis lurida, also known as the yellow fern, is a species of fern native to Australia and New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Lastreopsis lurida can be made by drying the leaves and using them in teas, infusions, or tinctures.
